name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1 can (14 oz) artichoke hearts, chopped and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Drain the thawed spinach and press out excess moisture with a clean towel or paper towels.
5. Stir the spinach into the onions.
6. Mix in artichoke hearts, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce, lemon juice, and curry powder (if using).
7. Fold in Parmesan cheese until well combined.
8. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased 1-quart casserole dish.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until bubbly and golden on top.
10. Serve with tortilla chips.
Yield: 2 cups.
